'''Reina Solov''' was a [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] of [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeology]] at the [[University of Byblos/Legends|University of Byblos]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. Solov specialist area of study was ancient cultures and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] investigated the [[Fellowship of Kooroo]] religion.
